title: 紅石生電整合包【Redstone Survival Modpack】
description:
為奶油芝士伺服器訂製，單人亦可使用
This modpack customized for the ButterCheese server, also suitable for singleplayer.
body:
大家好，我是 **奏はるか**  
這是我為【奶油芝士】伺服器製作的整合包，  
喜歡紅石自動化與生電玩家也可以直接使用的整合包。  
整合包中包含了大多數紅石玩家常用的模組，  
同時也加入了適合單人遊玩的便利模組，  
以及與朋友聯機時必備的多人支援與語音模組。  
希望能讓大家更輕鬆地享受紅石與自動化的樂趣！  

---

Hello everyone, I am **奏はるか**.  
This is a modpack I created for the 【ButterCheese】 server,  
but it can also be used directly by players who enjoy Redstone automation and technical survival.  
The pack includes most of the commonly used mods for Redstone players,  
and also adds convenient mods for singleplayer,  
as well as essential multiplayer support and voice chat mods for playing with friends.  
I hope this modpack makes it easier for everyone to enjoy the fun of Redstone and automation!  

---

## 整合包特色 / Features
- 🔧 **紅石與自動化友好 / Redstone & Automation Friendly**  
  幫助玩家更輕鬆地建造與維護大型紅石工程。 / Makes it easier to build and maintain large Redstone contraptions.  

- 🎮 **單人便利功能 / Singleplayer Convenience**  
  提供輔助功能模組，提升單機體驗。 / Adds utility mods that enhance solo play.  

- 👥 **多人遊戲支援 / Multiplayer Support**  
  內建語音聊天與伺服器支援模組。 / Bundled with voice chat and server-compatible mods.  

- ⚡ **效能與穩定優化 / Performance & Stability**  
  減少延遲與卡頓，提升大型裝置穩定性。 / Optimized to reduce lag and keep automation stable.
